description.value: Price 430 gp; Slot none; CL 11th; Weight -; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION Upon activation, this pulsing white pebble creates an instantaneous burst of reverse gravity, which clears a 5-foot-diameter sphere of any loose stone or earth. The displacing stone then holds the affected stone or earth in place, keeping a collapsed tunnel clear for 1 minute. Once the duration ends, the loose earth collapses if itâs not supported. Displacing stones are destroyed when used, and donât affect living creatures. Activating a displacing stone is a standard action that doesnât provoke attacks of opportunity. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 215 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells move earth
